chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ أَطَاعَ الْمَخْلُوقَ فِي مَعْصِيَةِ الْخَالِقِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 161 – The one who obeys the creatures (people) regarding a disobedience to the Creator

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/69)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/69)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) لَا دِينَ لِمَنْ دَانَ بِطَاعَةِ مَنْ عَصَى اللَّهَ وَ لَا دِينَ لِمَنْ دَانَ بِفِرْيَةِ بَاطِلٍ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَ لَا دِينَ لِمَنْ دَانَ بِجُحُودِ شَيْ‏ءٍ مِنْ آيَاتِ اللَّهِ.

en.hubeali: Abu ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan, from Al A’ala, from Muhammad Bin Muslim wo said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no Religion for the one who makes it a Religion by the obedience of the one who disobeys Allah<sup>azwj</sup>; and there is no Religion for the one who makes it a Religion by the forged falsehood upon Allah<sup>azwj</sup>; and there is no Religion for the one who makes it a Religion by denying something from the Signs of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 4. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan from al-‘Ala’ from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever obeys, considering it a matter of his religion, one who disobeys Allah, has no religion, and so also is one who follows what is forged against Allah as well as one who accepts as a matter of his religion, to reject any signs of Allah.’”
